title: Better Vampirism Combat
description: A better combat datapack with custom combos for every weapon added by Vampirism!
body:
Adds custom combos for each vampirism weapon.
- Heart Piercer - based on the estoc, a medieval thrusting sword
- Heart Striker - two-handed mix of one handed upward swings and two handed downward slashes
- Hunter Axe - two-handed alternating horizontal and downward swings culminating in a slam attack
- Pitchfork - two-handed alternating thrusts with a final slam
- Stake - held like an actual stake, starts with a punch followed by a stab and a downward slam

_No custom animations yet but I am working on learning blender to add them, when I do a link to the resource pack with new animations will be added in place of this line._
